description: Iconic 5-star hotel in Manama. Note: Currently undergoing renovations. Historical pricing around 17 BHD per person.

description: Modern hotel in Juffair with ballroom facilities. Contact for specific wedding package rates.

name: Wyndham Grand Manama
description: Iconic spiraling tower in Bahrain Bay. Wedding packages start from approx 15 BHD++.

name: Conrad Bahrain Financial Harbour
description: Luxury hotel with panoramic views. Contact venue for wedding package pricing.

nameAr: لاغونا بيتش لاكشري ريزورت آند سبا
description: Luxury resort in Budaiya. Packages start from 24 BHD per person.

name: Gulf Hotel Bahrain Convention & Spa
description: Iconic 5-star hotel in Manama. Features the Al Dana Ballroom (up to 900 guests) and Awal Ballroom. Wedding packages from 16 BHD net/person (Sat-Wed), 18 BHD net/person (Thu-Fri).

name: Dragon Beach Hotel
description: If you’re looking for a venue that stands out, the Dragon is the ideal destination for meetings and events. Combining excellent facilities with a prime location and a range of leisure activities, our hotel’s beach setting provides the perfect backdrop for product launches, team-building events, conferences, meetings, and staff outings. With amenities such as complimentary venue-wide Wi-Fi and convenient parking, we ensure your guests enjoy both comfort and convenience throughout their stay.

name: Solymar Hotel (Amwaj Islands)
description: The property’s grand ballroom accommodates up to 1,000 guests, making it ideal for conferences, weddings, and events. It is supported by five additional fully equipped meeting rooms for added guest comfort.

name: Al Zahraa Wedding Hall
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama listed on Zafaf.net. Large indoor/outdoor capacity (500++). Contact the hall for pricing and package details.

name: Dana Wedding Hall
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama listed on Zafaf.net. Large capacity (500++). Minimum cost shown: 20 BHD per person.

name: Prestige Hall Al Ahli Club
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama listed on Zafaf.net. Capacity shown: 100-200 (men and women sections). Contact the hall to confirm full package pricing.

name: Al Layali Hall
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama listed on Zafaf.net. Capacity: 300-500 guests. Pricing notes include hall starting at 2000 BHD and minimum 20 BHD per person.

name: The Heaven
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama listed on Zafaf.net. Total capacity shown 500++; indoor 200-300; outdoor 500++. Pricing notes include hall from 1500 BHD and 10 BHD per person.

name: Dunya Almesbah For Weddings
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama listed on Zafaf.net. Capacity shown around 300-500 guests. Contact the hall for package and pricing details.

name: Al Anwar Hall
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama listed on Zafaf.net. Capacity shown: 200-300 guests. A price of 200 BHD is shown on the listing; contact to confirm the exact pricing model.

name: Narimat Hall
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama listed on Zafaf.net. Capacity shown: 200-300 guests. A price of 250 BHD is shown on the listing; contact to confirm package details.

name: Barakah Hall
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama listed on Zafaf.net. Capacity shown: 300-500 guests. A price of 200 BHD is shown on the listing; contact to confirm package details.

name: Kaser Almurgan Hall
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama listed on Zafaf.net. Capacity shown around 300-500 guests. Contact the hall for pricing and package details.

name: Nayyara Al Bahrain
description: Luxurious independent wedding hall located in Amwaj Islands (The Lagoon Park). One of the most grand wedding halls in Bahrain with capacity for 350-400 guests. Hall rental starts from 1050 BHD.

name: Exhibition World Bahrain
description: Award-winning world-class convention centre. The Grand Hall seats up to 4,000 guests. Versatile spaces for lavish weddings and private functions with customizable setups, fine dining, and dedicated event planning.

name: Al Durra Wedding Hall
description: Independent wedding hall in Manama. Accommodates up to 400 guests with special bride suite. Known for elegant decoration and professional event management.

name: New Seasons Wedding Hall
description: One of Bahrain's most exquisite independent wedding halls in Tubli. Suitable for a variety of events and ceremonies. Video & photography services available.

name: Alkawthar Hall
description: Party hall in Sitra with all facilities to host weddings, birthday parties, corporate functions and all kinds of events. Multiple branches available.

name: The Orangery
description: An elegant tea room and patisserie located in the grounds of The Palace Boutique Hotel. The tea room can be transformed for magical ceremonies. The Secret Garden outdoor area is a beautiful wedding venue with seamless service and menu customisation.
